summary_one_line_zh: 推理时搜索、代理自我修复和产品化数据工具链同时在前进
summary_one_line_en: Inference-time search, self-healing agents, and data tooling are all moving.

items.title_zh: 为测试时搜索训练多样性
items.why_zh: 直接针对推理期搜索/规划器：训练分布更宽，能提升搜索器选出的轨迹质量。
items.why_en: Targets inference-time search directly: broader training improves trajectory quality under test-time selectors.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们的候选采样/beam策略加一组“多样性优先”对照实验。
items.so_what_en: Add a diversity-first ablation to your sampling or beam search stack.

items.why_zh: 把代理能力、插件和查询可解释性做成可扩展产品，而不是一次性 demo。
items.why_en: Turns agent capabilities, plugins, and query explainability into a productizable surface, not a demo.
items.so_what_zh: 检查你的 agent 是否能把“看结果”与“看执行计划/SQL”同屏暴露。
items.so_what_en: Expose result views and execution traces side by side in your agent UI.

items.title_zh: 源码级自我改写让代理持续进化
items.title_en: Agents that rewrite their own source
items.why_zh: 把“上线后不再学习”的代理缺陷前移为可控的自改写/回归机制，影响 agent 运维范式。
items.why_en: Turns post-deploy stasis into controlled self-rewrite and regression loops, changing agent ops.
items.so_what_zh: 为高频失败路径加自动补丁候选与回归测试，不要只靠人工热修。
items.so_what_en: Add auto-patch candidates and regression tests for recurring failures.
